entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Xule version: 3.0.30050 -

[DQC.US.0001.59] The concept RevenuePercentageOnSales with a value of 0.444 is dimensionally qualified with the PlanNameAxis and the base taxonomy member SalesMember. Only extension members should be used with the axis PlanNameAxis. The properties of the fact for RevenuePercentageOnSales are: Period: 2023-12-31 Dimensions: us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskByTypeAxis=edbl.com:NumberOfCustomerOneMember, us-gaap:PlanNameAxis=us-gaap:SalesMember Unit: pure
